app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: Agraw n tifiḍwin n tɣellist yellan d afaydur, ittwaɣzan s AI, ideg tzemreḍ ad tnaɣeḍ aṭas n tifiḍwin i tneḍfar s ufus
search.label: Mmeslay fell-aɣ wayen tufiḍ
search.placeholder: ud. tafyilt n usegres n usdis, ulac isem n tɣellist

search.hint_voting: Vote results up or down to change their ranking — starred results always appear first.
results.no_results_announce: Ulac igmaḍ n '{query}'. Ɛreḍ isem n uɣanib, anaw n uferdis, neɣ awalen nniḍen.
results.no_results_body: Ɛreḍ isem n uɣanib (p.m. 'button'), anaw n uferdis (p.m. 'input'), neɣ awalen nniḍen.

detail.refine_hint_ai: Sefru ayen trid ad tbeddled ama AI ad isneflel d yuɣal yessirew tibawelt-ik. Beddel anemhal-ik n AI neɣ seḥbes-it deg
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: ⵙⵔⵙ ⵉⵥⵡⴰⵔⵏ ⵖ ⵉⴷⵉⵙ ⵏⵖ ⴽⵜⴱ ⴰⴷ. ⵣⵎⵔ AI ⵖ
detail.refine_hint_no_ai_suffix: ⵉⵙⵏⴼⵍ ⵖ ⵓⵙⵉⵙ ⵏ ⵜⵉⵢⴰⴼⵓⵜⵉⵏ ⵏⵏⴽ.
detail.refine_placeholder_ai: ⴰⵎⴷ: ⴷ ⴰⴼⵓⵙ ⵉ mobile, ⵉⵙⵏⵓⴱⴳ tooltip
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Amedya: "Imiḍanen n usɣan Aziran am waya ttwafen deg ukemmil n Aswir n Uɣal. Illa umkan i yimiḍanen n usɣan imẓiyen ad ttwafen s deffir ma llan ifrag."
detail.rewrite_aria: Sekmed tiqet d usneflel n yiḍarren ittwafernen s AI
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: ⴰⵥⵡⴰⵔ ⴰⴷ ⵉⵍⴰ. ⵓⵔ ⵍⵍⴰ ⵎⴰ ⵉⵜⵜⵓⵅⴹⴰⵔ.
detail.confirm_reset_body: Tgeɣ ibeddilen imquranen deg uḍris-a. Aselkem ad yessufeɣ akk n tneqqiḍin-ik.
settings.heading: ⵜⴰⵙⵏⵉⴼⵍⵜ
settings.ai_enable_desc: Tseɣti timaɣanin akked/neɣ taɣuri tettwasɣet ɣef usnas n AI-nnek.
settings.privacy_body_1: Tura, akk isefka ttwaseɣent deg uqqal aneggaru n uberraq-nnek s localStorage. Ulac ayen yettwazen yid-neɣ ɣer yal aqeddac. Isefka iɣezfanen ttwakecmen: asɣensu, tutlayt, tafrant n tafrant, asetting n Anadi Adyuz, afran n API n AI, tisura n API, iḥrazen, inqqizen, igmaḍ iɣezfanen, igmaḍ iɣeblan, igmaḍ ineggura, igmaḍ imsegdalen, tizeɣwin n uḍris aneṣli, d agmad aneggaru i teftit.
settings.privacy_body_2: Tisura n API ttwaseɣent deg uberraq-nnek kan d ttwazent akken ula d aqeddac n AI i tesɣit. Ur nezri neɣ ur nessumer. Tzemreḍ ad tent-tɣeyyreḍ ticki tebɣiḍ seg isettingen n AI d deffir, neɣ s usefru n isefka n usmel-agi n uberraq-nnek.
settings.privacy_body_translations: Tifrat n UI d uḍris aɣelnaw aɣelnaw ttwasuttlen s AI uḍmiren ad mmekten iɣisi. Ulac isefka n useqdac, igmaḍ imsegdalen, neɣ tizeɣwin nessneṭ ur ttwazen ara i usuttlen.
settings.reduced_motion_note: Ulɣu ameẓẓuɣ itteddu. Ilullu am confetti ttwaɣlent. Ad tent-tsuɣreḍ ɣer deffir, kkes ulɣu ameẓẓuɣ deg iɣewwaren n tnasniwt n OS-ik.
notfound.heading: 404: Ttwaliɣ deg Ilel
notfound.body: Asebter-a ur yelli ara. Uɣal ɣer usebter agejdan.
party.announce_full: ⴰⵣⴰⵎⵓⵍ ⵏ ⵜⴼⴰⵙⴽⴰ ⵉⵙⴳⵎⴹ! ⵉⴱⴷⴷⵍ ⵓⵏⵖⵎⵉⵙ ⵉ Comic Sans. ⵉⴱⴷⴷⵍⵏ ⵉⵔⵉⵖⵏ. ⵜⵜⵓⵙⴽⵛⵎ confetti. ⵉⴱⴷⴷⵍ cursor ⵏ ratón ⵉ tizza n usihap.
party.announce_reduced: ⴰⵣⴰⵎⵓⵍ ⵏ ⵜⴼⴰⵙⴽⴰ ⵉⵙⴳⵎⴹ! ⵉⴱⴷⴷⵍ ⵓⵏⵖⵎⵉⵙ ⵉ Comic Sans. ⵉⴱⴷⴷⵍⵏ ⵉⵔⵉⵖⵏ. ⵉⴱⴷⴷⵍ cursor ⵏ ratón. ⵉⵜⵜⵓⵇⵇⴰⴷ confetti ⵖ ⵓⵙⵉⵡⴹ ⵉⵍⵍⴰ.
kofi.title: Tiɣawsiwin n usentem ɣef Ko-fi
about.what_body: Tagi d tadliwin n igmaḍ n tmuɣli n tnasniwt i tezrawin n ufus. Nadi ayen tẓriḍ, af asbadu i ilaqen, nqel-it ɣer uneqqis-ik.
about.what_wcag: Isefka agi ittɛallaṭ WCAG 2.2 Aswir A d AA, alugen i ittseqdacen waṭṭasen n tmuɣliwin akked tessna n kra n yisefka n tezrawt. Kra n imeɣbuḍen n Aswir AAA ttegmen ula d nni anda aklan n tnasniwt yecna yettaru tigawt-agi d taɣara.
about.step_1_body: ⴽⵜⴱ ⵎⴰⵢⴷ ⵜⵛⴰⵔⴽⴷ — ⴰⵙⵎ ⵏ ⵓⵙⴱⴷⴷⵉ, ⴰⵏⴰⵡ ⵏ ⵓⵙⵏⴼⵍ, ⵏⵖ ⴰⴼⵙⵙⴰⵢ.
about.step_2_body: Seqed tibewwiqin n Ufella / Wadda deg yal amaynut i usnifel n tazwart n yicewwiqen. Kkes-it adeg awezlan. Sekmed i txilt.
about.step_3_body: Fren tamuɣli i yettmahalen aṭṭas. Tigawin ttwasɣayen s usemres.
about.step_4_body: Rnu tamesdayt n umkan (mld. "Global:") neɣ seqed AI i usneflel n uglam.
about.feature_ai_body: Sqedec AI ad yesεerred agmuḍ ɣef tiwtilin-ik. Awi API key-ik nnig Anthropic, OpenAI, neɣ Google. Yeddem deg isefsar-ik ur d-yettwaznel ara ɣurneɣ. Siweḍ-it deg
about.feature_languages_body: Tadliwin agi tella deg ufella n 50 tutlayin timeɣbabent d tɣara n tutlayin tettɛeddun s azelmaḍ. Ɣuri-d talɣiwin d tεajjibt ɣef tutlayt, taɣerma, d tmeslayt. Rnu tutlayin agi akk d aẓekki, am talɣa, am ugraw, am uqerreb ɣer umaynut, am usemlel aẓar. Itran n tsuqelt d kra n AI, fhem-it-id mkul tikelt ɣef tɣawsiwin n usnulfu. Isnulfawen-ines d asentem. Snekber deg
about.feature_party_body: ⵖ ⵜⴰⵙⵏⵉⴼⵍⵜ. ⵙ ⵓⵣⵔⴰⴽ. ⵜⴳⴰⵎ ⵜⵙⵏⵜⵢⵜ.
about.feature_a11y_body: Yewwen s WCAG 2.2. Ittegmen taɛekkast n tafukna, taɣult n tegnatin, tanaḍit tafellawt s tfelwit, taɛkast n ulɣu ameẓẓuɣ, d tqubbaḍin n ini-s n usmenyef ugaraw.
about.coming_auth: Google ⵏⵖ GitHub sign in devices.
about.coming_custom: Rnu snifel imiḍanen-ik inimeẓ, iḥeḍḍen s wudem uslig deg uḍris ibanan.
settings.confirm_reset_all_heading: Ales Isettingen d Usfeɣ n Isefka
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: API ⵜⵉⵙⵔⵔⵓⵜⵉⵏ ⴷ ⵜⴰⵙⵏⵉⴼⵍⵜ ⴽⵓⵍⵍⵓ. ⵓⵔ ⵉⵎⵎⴰⵍ.
settings.unsaved_body: Ɣur-k ibeddilen ur ntwagel ara. Acu tebɣiḍ ad txedmeḍ?
settings.language_changed_announce: Tutlayt: Ttwabeddlet, cudd taqeffalt n usekdes ad tesnirmeḍ
results.vote_hint: Vote results up or down — higher-rated matches appear first. Star a result to always pin it to the top.
settings.voting_on: Vote controls are visible on each result.
about.step_5_body: Nɣel aɣewwaṛ d yiγewwaṛen n usenker merra ɣer tferkiwin-nnek neɣ ineqqis-nnek.
search.view_all_confirm_body: Aya ad yesken {count} n yicewwiqen deg yiwen n usebter.
detail.revise_desc_checkbox: Kcem isallen n umiḍan / Aglam deg usnifel
detail.revise_fix_checkbox: Rnu Isurfen n Usellek deg usneflel
detail.revise_error_body: Yuḍ wayen s ufus n usneflel. Qes Sekmed & Snifel Ittwafernen i uɛawed.
settings.api_key_error: Tuccḍa: Taskart API ilaq s uɣedwal ma AI Assist ittwasersen.
error.heading: Yuḍ Wayen
error.body: Tsebḍit n yimiḍanen ur tezmir ara ad tettwaɣer. Senqed tuqqna-ik u
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: Taskart n API tettwal neɣ ur telli (i {provider}). Senqed taskart-ik deg Yiɣerbazen.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Tiɣimit n tizrigin tewweḍ ({provider}). Ḍeṭṭel akk d uɛawed.
detail.revise_error_service_error: Tuccḍa n umseddur {provider} ({status}). Ɛawed s cwayt.
detail.revise_error_network_error: Ulac tuqqna n internet. Senqed tuqqna-ik d uɛawed.
settings.reset_all_announce: Akk Isettingen Ttwalesent d Isefka Ttwasfeɣen.
about.what_body_2: Tasmenyif d tasɣart, aṭṭas deg uεmel-agi, uriɣ ad lliɣ asmenyaf deg uεdil, asekker, iɣewwaṛen, d yiγewwaṛen n usenker amiknaw yellan. Nadi deg tɣermant-agi n yiɣewwaṛen imtawalen d WCAG, fren wid yettmahalen d tmuɣli-nnek, sentem neɣ rnu isallen, ccekk/ṭṭef-it-id merra ɣer ineqqisen-nnek.
error.announce: Yeḍra-d wudem. Taktabt n igmaḍ ur tettwaɣam ara. Senqed tamsilt-ik d ales.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain language, near-duplicates are consolidated, and each is aligned to a specific WCAG success criterion. Sources consulted include:
detail.copy_all_aria: Nqel aglam d uselkem yettwasugg̈sen mgaraden
detail.copy_all_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Selkem aglam d uselkem yettwasugg̈sen ɣer tɣawsiwin n tazwara
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching language or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other languages will be AI-translated unless you edit them manually — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other languages will show AI-translated text. Translations are updated only during site maintenance.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version of the same finding. Make any edits and save, or skip to leave the English version unchanged.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Show or hide entries introduced in each WCAG version.
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Aṭṭas n tgeɣrifiyin seg twaculin n tɣellist d tneɣmast n imḍebren. Taɣellist-inek tettwassaɣ, ulac anekcum, ulac isenfaṛen, ulac iselkinen.
onboarding.heading: Ansuf γer A11yFred
onboarding.confirm_body: Ur tawiḍ ara armas n tzelliɛt. Mdel issa u ffeɣ seg wid yellan?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Mmeslay fell-aɣ wayen tufiḍ: isem n usfaylu, aferdis neɣ amatar n tɛeṭṭuft WCAG. Seqdec iḥerfiyen n {platform} d uswir WCAG i usewseq. Seqdec Aẓeyyeḍ n Igmaḍen i usebded s wayen yettban. Igmaḍen ttwasebden s tlaqit, ticki deg uswir n tsemmantiyt.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Seqdec Siwel Aɛla/Adda i usifer n igmaḍen s tiɣaṭ-nsent. Ṭṭef tamɣart i wayen ara yettban dima ticki d amezwaru. Senteq amaɣun i usaḍaf-is deg imezguren akk.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Ldi amaɣnu i wakken ad twaliḍ azwel-nnes, asertan WCAG, aglam, d usnulfu imuqnen. Rnu azwel n ugejdan i uglam (p.m. 'Amatu:'). Seqdec AI Assist i usnifl n yal aɣanib s yimaqqalen-nnek, syin nqel iɣaniben kra kra neɣ seqdec Nqel Akk i wakken ad d-taɣeḍ akk ayen yellan.
search.narrow_clear_aria: Sfeḍ azeyyeḍ n usewseq u uɣal ɣer tazwara
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: Taɣellist n isnasen idiganen tettɛeṭṭil akk ɣer tnaḍt n web.
search.hint_ranking: Seqdec Siwel Aɛla/Adda i usnulfu n wamek ara ttwasebden igmaḍen. Ṭṭef amaɣun i uskan-is dima d amezwaru.
search.hint_syntax_prefix: Seqdec +awal i usɣan awal d -awal i ubɣeḍ-is (ud.
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Sfeḍ azeyyeḍ n usewseq u uɣal ɣer unadi ummid
search.view_all_confirm_starred_one: 1 ittwatteɣ s tnaɣlit yetban dima d amezwaru.
search.view_all_confirm_starred: {count} ttwatteɣen s tnaɣlit ttban dima d imezwura.
search.view_all_confirm_archived_one: 1 ittwakrez yetban dima deg tazwara n tmelwin n tuffra.
search.view_all_confirm_archived: {count} ttwaḥbsen ɣur daxel wumaḍ yellan, ɣas tamalayt ad tban dima deg tmazwart n tguri n ignanen.
search.view_all_confirm_body_one: Aya ad isken 1 n usfaddu deg usebter-agi.
results.sort_live_hint: Anadi aẓilal yettwassbedd. Ignanen ad ttwasneflen seld n usklas neɣ asnifel n ufran.
results.summary_query: Ttuɣalen igmaḍ n '{query}', msekken s '{sort}', yerẓa s '{narrow}', {platform}.
results.sort_smart_info: Asnefli ameslay iswi s tussna uqbel, seld s usefrak-ik umḍan. Ignanen yellan d iẓrin tban dima deg uẓar; Ignanen ttwaḥbsen tban dima deg tnafa. D asnefli amagnu.
results.sort_sc: SC ur iteddu ara (Amezwaru ɣer Aneggaru)
results.sort_wcag_level_info: Ineḍruyen n AAA sɛan taɣult tasneflit deg usenfar-agi. Ur mšekkilent ara akk ineḍruyen n wallal n AAA, akk ineḍruyen yellan d AAA zemren ad kksen tannayt tamezwarut ɣer imiḍanen n tazwit ameqran.
results.sort_popularity_info: Deg usmiren d-iteddun, aya ad isken tameslayt tamassant tebna ɣef tnayin n yimsisen deg akk imiḍanen. Seld assa, tameslayt tebna ɣef tɣimit ɣef usebter tettmettil mmi ttufɣed isnasen.
results.rank_hint: Snefli ignanen ɣer deffir neɣ ɣer uẓar i usnefli. Ẓer i ban uqbel. Ḥbes i tuffɣa. (Zemren ad ttwarran.)
results.unpin_from_search: Usfaddu-agi yettwakkes. Kkes aṭṭis i usmiren deg ignanen n unaḍ.
detail.discard_confirm_body: Iftitaḥ n tmuɣt tamaynut ad yessufeɣ aflaj-ik yettwaggan akked ɣef wamek ur yettwaḥeḍṛen ara.
detail.include_desc_title_when_copied: Kcem azwel n uɣlam srad nqel
detail.include_fix_title_when_copied: Kcem azwel n uselkem yettwasugg̈sen srad nqel
detail.ai_revision_hint: Fren iɣerbazen ara yettwaselkmen s tebṣiṣin imunn, rnu tiẓḍiwin-ik dagi, AI ad isselkem iɣerbazen-nni. Iwakken ad tbeddleḍ anemhal n AI neɣ ad t-tekkeḍ, ddu ɣer
detail.finding_note_hint: Rnu talɣiwin dagi: adeg, tiẓḍiwin n uqerru, neɣ ayen yelhan amaɣnu. Sentem AI Assist deg
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: amedya: wagi d amsaɣ n mobile, aɣbel d tooltip
detail.finding_note_placeholder: amedya: Uqerru ameqqran, yettwaff deg tafat n Onboarding. Iqerray imẓiyen zemren ad d-ffɣen ticki wid-nni ttwaselkmen.
detail.ai_revision_aria: Ḥeḍṛ timsalin n AI selkem iɣerbazen ifren
detail.ai_revision_error_body: Walaɣ aɣilif yella deg uselkem. Ekkes Ḥeḍṛ & Selkem Ifren iwakken ad tɛreḍ tikkelt nniḍen.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: Tasarut n API ur teslid ara neɣ tettas ({provider}). Senqeq tasarut-ik deg Iɣewwaren.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: Timirt n tezrigin tettwaṭṭef ({provider}). Ḍṛu aṭas n tallit tikkelt nniḍen.
detail.ai_revision_error_service_error: Aɣilif n umeẓlu n {provider} ({status}). Ɛreḍ tikkelt nniḍen deg waṭas n tiṣnatin.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: Ulac taqqit n internet. Senqeq taqqit-ik tikkelt nniḍen.
help.take_tour_description: Ales asnulfu n tgelda n uεraḍ amzwaru ad tεawed tẓreḍ amek A11yFred itteddu.
help.step_1_body: Igmaḍ ttban-d ula d akka tettaruḍ. Sqedec afrez n tfellayt deg Iɣewwaren ad tferreẓ igmaḍ n Web neɣ n usnas amagnu (waṭṭasen ttmeslayen ɣef web). Sqedec +awal ad tkkes awal, -awal ad t-tɣel (amedya: keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Kull agmuḍ ɣurs-d isenfaren n «Snes ɣer Ufella» d «Snes ɣer Wadda» ad tbeddleḍ amkan-is. Creq agmuḍ ad yili dayen amezwaru. Senteq-it ad yeddem amkan-is ameggaru deg meṛṛa inadin.
help.step_3_body: Fren agmuḍ i ilaqen akken ad yaεreḍ ayen tẓriḍ. Igmaḍ ttɛettaben s tmaɣunt uqbel, ɣer deffir s ddeqqa.
help.step_4_body: Rnu azwel n ugejdan i uglam (p.m. 'Amatu:' neɣ 'Taɣuri:'). Ma yella AI Assist iqedd, rnu yimaqqalen-nnek deg uɣanib n Timaqqalin n Usnifl, AI ad isneflel amaɣnu i wakken ad yesmagen asiwel-nnek.
help.step_5_body: Nqel asbadu d usikkil i yettuqtaren ɣer tqeffalut neɣ n uneqqis-ik. Sqedec «Nqel Akk» ad tawiḍ sin iɣewwaren da yiwen umiḍi.
help.shortcuts_note: Tiqeffalt ttedddun kan ma yella tafukna ɣef taslist n igmaḍ. Sqedcet-tent ad tnadiḍ tuffut akken ad texdmeḍ igmaḍ s wudem aruran.
help.shortcut_u: U = Sfeɣ agmuḍ amecnaw seg uxzen
help.shortcut_rank_up: Shift + ↑ = Snes ɣer ufella agmuḍ amecnaw
help.shortcut_rank_down: Shift + ↓ = Snes ɣer wadda agmuḍ amecnaw
about.what_body_2_prefix: Iɣewwaren imeslayen ttban-d deg kra n yiwen n usmel. Afecku agi ittnaɣ ad isers iṣebbaren-ik ad mṭafaqen deg igmaḍ, acku ur tettaruḍ ara s tazwara kull tikelt. Tadliwin twennez-d seg lexdem n tezrawin timecṭaḥin, ɣer deffir tesnulfat-d s AI i wulawen meqqren, tεiwed, d usenqed s
about.feature_agentic_body: Ma tettseqdaceḍ Claude (Anthropic), tzemreḍ ula d akken ad tferniḍ Smenyif i Uɣanib Yellan. AI ad inadi deg igmaḍ n usnulfu yezrin ad yemṭafeq d uɣanib d uglim i tessneqleḍ, ur isεerred ara kan agmuḍ amecnaw s uzzel.
about.examples_ath001_label: Taqeffalt neɣ Aseɣwen Ur Isemman Ara
about.examples_ath010_label: Asentel n Usanaḍ Isefsar Aẓaṭu, Ur Iqeddem Ara Amdan
about.examples_ath013_label: Tagnit n Uɣbalu Ur Telli Ara Tameɣtut
about.examples_ath019_label: ARIA Ittseqdac s Wudem Ur Iteɛdil Ara
settings.party_confirm_body: Yal acu itteddun ad yili d aɣilif aεqab d iɛser ad yili izeɣ.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Tsuqelt agi d-tewweḍ s AI ur ttwasneqdeḍ ara s yimeddukkal ituruhingiyen.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Akal n Rohingy yecna aɣref d uẓeṭṭa s tazwara. Ttseqdac tsuqelt agi s taẓuri, beddel ma tzemreḍ.
settings.platform_all_desc: Sken meṛṛa igmaḍ s web, isnasen imagnuten, d idduklen.
settings.ranking_on: Isenqaden n uḥraz ttwarun ɣef yal agmad.
settings.starred_results_desc: Igmaḍ ineqqzen zemren ad d-awin ɣer uzwel, s umḍiq i ttwaneqqzen.
settings.archived_results_desc: Igmaḍ iɣezfanen ttban ɣer tama n tzqit n igmaḍ.
settings.rankings_desc: Iḥrazen ifuren d wafella i tɣataṭ i igmaḍ. Amḍiq ameqqran n ugmad ɣef wiyaḍ, d amezwaru i d-itban deg unadi.
settings.confirm_reset_all_item_api_keys: Akk tisura n API n iqeddacen n AI
